summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Módulo de Reembolsos (Refund Module). All 20 backend API tests passed (100%) and all 19 frontend UI tests passed (100%). The module is fully functional.
seed_data_creation: Test data was created and cleaned up after testing. 4 existing reembolsos remain in the system.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Módulo de Reembolsos is fully functional. All CRUD operations work correctly. Status flow (Aberto → Aguardando Dados Bancários → Enviado ao Financeiro → Pago/Cancelado) is working. The 'Reter 10%' badge correctly appears only for 'desistencia' motivo. Both admin and assistente roles have full access to the module.

tested_features.TEST_1_Menu_Reembolsos_Admin: PASS - Admin sidebar shows 'Reembolsos' menu item
tested_features.TEST_2_Menu_Reembolsos_Assistente: PASS - Assistente sidebar shows 'Reembolsos' menu item
tested_features.TEST_3_Dashboard_Cards: PASS - Dashboard shows status cards (Abertos, Aguardando, No Financeiro, Pagos, Total Geral)
tested_features.TEST_4_Dashboard_Card_Count: PASS - Found 8 dashboard status cards with correct counts
tested_features.TEST_5_Nova_Solicitacao_Button: PASS - 'Nova Solicitação' button visible and clickable
tested_features.TEST_6_Table_Headers: PASS - Table displays: Aluno, Curso, Motivo, Chamado SGC, Status, Abertura, Ações
tested_features.TEST_7_Modal_Nova_Solicitacao: PASS - Modal opens with all form fields
tested_features.TEST_8_Form_Fields: PASS - All form fields present (Nome, CPF, Curso, Turma, Motivo, Chamado SGC, Observações)
tested_features.TEST_9_Create_Reembolso: PASS - Reembolso creation works via API
tested_features.TEST_10_Reter_10_Badge: PASS - 'Reter 10%' badge visible only for 'desistencia' motivo
tested_features.TEST_11_Modal_Detalhes: PASS - Details modal opens with all information
tested_features.TEST_12_Detail_Sections: PASS - All sections present (Dados do Aluno, Dados da Solicitação, Datas do Fluxo)
tested_features.TEST_14_Status_Select: PASS - Status dropdown present in edit modal
tested_features.TEST_15_Date_Inputs: PASS - Date inputs present (Data Retorno Financeiro, Data Provisão Pagamento)
tested_features.TEST_17_Assistente_Menu: PASS - Assistente can see Reembolsos menu
tested_features.TEST_18_Assistente_Access: PASS - Assistente can access Reembolsos page
tested_features.TEST_19_Assistente_Create: PASS - Assistente can see 'Nova Solicitação' button

backend_api_tests.test_get_motivos_reembolso: PASS - Returns 6 motivos with correct reter_taxa flags
backend_api_tests.test_list_reembolsos: PASS - Returns paginated list with correct structure

verified_status_flow.aberto: Initial status when reembolso is created
